benchmarks._note: Approximate industry reference values for Ontario/Canada residential, total site energy per conditioned m2. Sources below are as-of 2024-2025.

eui_kwh_m2_yr._source: NRCan residential end-use intensity; CHBA Net Zero program

embodied_carbon_kg_co2e_m2._source: Cradle-to-gate mean for new low-rise residential (Living Materials Lab / ScienceDirect, 2024)

energy_rates._note: Ontario residential all-in retail energy prices, 2025. Used for utility bill and lifecycle cost estimates.
energy_rates.electricity_source: OEB TOU/tiered ~12c/kWh energy + delivery/regulatory; blended all-in Nov 2025
energy_rates.natural_gas_source: Enbridge Ontario all-in ~$0.50/m3 / 10.35 kWh per m3
energy_rates.grid_intensity_source: The Atmospheric Fund, Ontario Emissions Factors 2024 (73.8 gCO2e/kWh)
energy_rates.solar_rebate_source: Ontario Home Renovation Savings Program (HRS), ~$5k toward rooftop PV
